tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"configure terminal
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
 switchport mode access
 switchport port-security
 switchport port-security maximum 1
 switchport port-security violation restrict
 switchport port-security mac-address sticky
 exit
interface GigabitEthernet0/2
 switchport mode access
 switchport port-security

 switchport port-security mac-address sticky
 exit

 exit

 exit
interface GigabitEthernet0/5

 switchport port-security violation restrict

 exit
interface GigabitEthernet0/6

 switchport port-security
 switchport port-security maximum 1
 switchport port-security violation restrict
 switchport port-security mac-address sticky
 exit
end
write memory"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
configure terminal
          ^
% Invalid input detected at '^' marker.

Switch>interface GigabitEthernet0/1
       ^
% Invalid input detected at '^' marker.

Switch> switchport mode access
         ^
% Invalid input detected at '^' marker.

Switch> switchport port-security
         ^
% Invalid input detected at '^' marker.

Switch> switchport port-security maximum 1
         ^
% Invalid input detected at '^' marker.

Switch> switchport port-security violation restrict
         ^
% Invalid input detected at '^' marker.

Switch> switchport port-security mac-address sticky
         ^
% Invalid input detected at '^' marker.

Switch> exit

































Switch con0 is now available





Press RETURN to get started.
